title: Consistency and honesty fixes
userStory: As a user who has partially completed onboarding, I want the sidebar progress, the wizard stepper, and the save indicators to reflect true state rather than mock or hardcoded values, so that the UI I see matches what is actually happening.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `AppSidebar` derives onboarding progress from `onboarding-state.json` via `loadOnboarding` (or a loader-injected prop passed through the `_app.tsx` layout), not from `mock.onboardingSeed`. `grep -n 'onboardingSeed\|mock.onboardingSeed' work-hq/src/components/work-hq/AppSidebar.tsx` returns no match. After advancing the wizard to phase 3, the sidebar progress bar and 'Phase N of 6' label show phase 3 without restarting the dev server.

The onboarding stepper in the wizard top rail (currently six plain `<span className='size-1.5 rounded-full …'/>` dot elements at lines ~306–316 of onboarding.tsx) is replaced with labeled step indicators showing each phase title from the `phases` array (lines ~131–137). Phases present in `completedPhases` render as clickable elements — clicking one calls `setPhase(p.n)` to navigate back. Phases with `n > currentPhase` render as non-interactive locked indicators. `grep -n 'completedPhases.*click\|phaseBack\|labeledStep\|stepButton' work-hq/src/routes/onboarding.tsx` returns at least one match.

`profileDetected` — the boolean that becomes true when the phase 3 `checkProfileExists` poll finds `context/profile.md` — is persisted to `onboarding-state.json` (e.g. as `answers.profileDetected: boolean`). After detection and a page refresh, phase 4 renders section cards immediately without re-showing the waiting state. `cat docs/data/local/onboarding-state.json` after profile detection shows a `profileDetected: true` value. `grep -n 'profileDetected' work-hq/src/routes/onboarding.tsx` returns at least one match confirming the flag is saved via `set()` or `saveNow()`.

`RitualLayout`'s header save-status line is truthful: either (a) the hardcoded string 'Saved to LocalStorage · just now' is removed — `grep -n 'Saved to LocalStorage\|just now' work-hq/src/components/work-hq/RitualLayout.tsx` returns no match — or (b) the string is replaced with a real relative-time display driven by a `savedAt?: string` ISO-timestamp prop, which visibly changes as time passes (e.g. from 'just now' to '1 min ago' after 60 s).

The `AutosaveField` 'Saving…/Saved' indicator does not flash on initial component mount. `grep -n 'first.current' work-hq/src/components/work-hq/AutosaveField.tsx` returns a match on a line that returns early before calling `setSaving(true)` — confirming the mount guard (lines ~24–29) is present and has not been accidentally removed by this story's surrounding refactors.

The `<button>` trigger element for the RoleCombobox and the `<button>` trigger element for the KeyToolsCombobox in `work-hq/src/routes/onboarding.tsx` each carry a programmatic label accessible to assistive technology — either `aria-labelledby` referencing the id of the visible `Field` label element, or an explicit `aria-label` attribute carrying the label text (e.g. `aria-label='Role'`, `aria-label='Key tools'`). This closes the WCAG SC 1.3.1 (Info and Relationships) gap flagged in story 014 QA follow-up #1. `grep -n 'aria-labelledby\|aria-label' work-hq/src/routes/onboarding.tsx` returns at least two matches, one for the role combobox trigger and one for the key-tools combobox trigger.

The header comment in `work-hq/src/server/check-handshake.ts` (lines ~18–19) accurately states the malformed-JSON behavior: when `handshake.json` exists but contains malformed JSON, the function returns `{ detected: true, verifiedAt: null, assistant: null }` — not `detected: false`. The comment must reflect this (per ADR-P6-008 existence-only detection rule: file presence is sufficient; content validity is not required for detection). `grep -n 'detected: true\|detected:.*true' work-hq/src/server/check-handshake.ts` returns at least one match confirming the corrected comment is present.

In the phase-2 locked verification state (when `handshakeDetected` is true), the lucide `` icon carries `aria-hidden={true}` so it is not announced redundantly by screen readers, and the visible confirmation text conveys the verification status textually without relying on the visual ✓ character — either via a `Verified:` prefix, an `aria-label` on the containing element, or equivalent screen-reader-complete text. `grep -n 'aria-hidden' work-hq/src/routes/onboarding.tsx` returns at least one match inside the `PhaseWire` locked-state block. `grep -n 'sr-only\|aria-label' work-hq/src/routes/onboarding.tsx` returns at least one match in the same block.

technicalNotes: Four distinct touch points. (1) `AppSidebar.tsx` lines 21–22: replace `const onbPhase = mock.onboardingSeed.phase` with a value sourced from `loadOnboarding`. The `_app.tsx` layout route already exists; add `loadOnboarding` to its route `loader` and pass the result as a prop to `AppSidebar`, or use TanStack Router's `useRouteContext`. (2) `onboarding.tsx` lines ~306–316: replace the six dot `<span>` elements with a labeled stepper using the `phases` array (line 130). Each step shows `p.title`; completed steps are `<button onClick={() => setPhase(p.n)}>`; locked steps are `<span aria-disabled>`. (3) `onboarding.tsx` `PhaseSeeding`: when `checkProfileExists` returns `{ exists: true }`, call `set('profileDetected', true)` in addition to the existing state update. Add `profileDetected: boolean` to the `Answers` type (line ~33) and `emptyAnswers` (line ~65), and to `normalizeAnswers` migration (line ~94). In `PhaseReviewCorrect`, check `answers.profileDetected` to skip the waiting state on reload. (4) `RitualLayout.tsx` line 31: remove the hardcoded string or accept a `savedAt?: string` prop and compute a relative time string (e.g. 'just now' / 'N min ago') using `Intl.RelativeTimeFormat` or a simple difference check. `AutosaveField.tsx` lines 24–29: the `first.current` guard is existing code — do not remove it; verify it is intact after any refactors to adjacent components.
outOfScope: Replacing mock data for adrs, questions, priorities, learnings, or the user chip (name/initials) in AppSidebar — those remain mock until a future story. Any changes to the Today, Backlog, or Wrap-Up ritual routes beyond RitualLayout's save indicator. Adding real user identity to the sidebar.

verificationPlan.checks: Returns no match — AppSidebar no longer references the mock onboarding seed.
Returns no match (string removed) or returns a match on a line that is inside a dynamic expression driven by a real timestamp prop.

verificationPlan.command: cat docs/data/local/onboarding-state.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('profileDetected:', d.get('answers', {}).get('profileDetected'))"
verificationPlan.checks: After profile detection in phase 3, returns 'profileDetected: True' confirming the flag is persisted to disk.

revisionLog.change: Added AC6: RoleCombobox and KeyToolsCombobox trigger buttons must carry aria-labelledby or aria-label to close WCAG SC 1.3.1 gap — grep-verifiable against onboarding.tsx.
revisionLog.reason: Story 014 QA follow-up #1 — QA approved 014 but flagged the combobox trigger aria-association gap as outside its AC scope; pre-implementation scope addition to 017.

revisionLog.change: Added AC7: check-handshake.ts header comment must correctly state detected: true (not detected: false) for malformed-JSON case, per ADR-P6-008 existence-only rule. Added AC8: phase-2 locked verification state Check icon must carry aria-hidden={true} and confirmation text must be screen-reader-complete without relying on the visual ✓ character.
revisionLog.reason: Story 015 QA follow-ups #1 and #2 — QA approved 015 but flagged the misleading server comment and the locked-state icon a11y gap as outside 015 AC scope; pre-implementation scope additions to 017.

impl.notes: AC1: _app.tsx route now loads loadOnboarding() and passes onboardingState to AppSidebar; AppSidebar derives onbPhase/onbComplete from onboarding-state.json (null → phase 1, complete when completedPhases includes 6), mock.onboardingSeed removed. AC2: the six top-rail dots are replaced with a labeled <nav> stepper — completed phases are back-nav <button>s (setPhase), the current phase carries aria-current='step', future phases are aria-disabled locked spans; every step exposes its phase title via aria-label + sr-only text; 24px (size-6) hit targets satisfy SC 2.5.8. AC3: profileDetected added to Answers/emptyAnswers/normalizeAnswers (coerced === true for legacy backward compat); PhaseSeeding seeds local state from answers.profileDetected and persists via set('profileDetected', true) on poll or manual refresh detection (debounced save writes it to disk); phase-4 renders cards on reload because the detected file is read by readProfile so the waiting state is not re-shown. AC4: RitualLayout's hardcoded 'Saved to LocalStorage · just now' removed (option a) — the ritual routes use mock state so no truthful savedAt exists. AC5: AutosaveField first.current mount guard verified intact (no change needed — AC only requires it remain; component untouched to preserve minimal diff). AC6: RoleCombobox trigger carries aria-label='Your role', KeyToolsCombobox trigger carries aria-label='Key tools'. AC7: check-handshake.ts header comment corrected to detected: true per ADR-P6-008 existence-only rule. AC8: PhaseWire locked verification Check icon carries aria-hidden={true}; an sr-only 'Verified:' prefix makes the confirmation screen-reader-complete without relying on the ✓ glyph.
verificationRun: npm run --prefix work-hq build → PASS (exit 0, built in ~450ms)
grep 'Saved to LocalStorage|just now' RitualLayout.tsx → no match (PASS)
grep profileDetected onboarding.tsx → match, saved via set() (PASS)
grep first.current AutosaveField.tsx → match on early-return guard (PASS)
grep 'aria-label' onboarding.tsx → role + key-tools trigger matches (PASS)
grep 'detected: true' check-handshake.ts → match in corrected comment (PASS)
grep aria-hidden + sr-only in PhaseWire locked block → match (PASS)
prettier --check touched files → onboarding.tsx has 2 pre-existing (identical at HEAD) eslint-disable indent warnings only; all story lines clean
